privileged_info_summary: The task document contains an excerpt from Charles Darwin's 'On the Origin of Species' (verified from Project Gutenberg #1228). The metadata accurately lists 4 chapter titles (CHAPTER I through IV with verified section titles) and 8 section headers distributed across those chapters. All chapter and section header texts match exactly what is created by the setup_task.sh script. The document is created programmatically in DOCX format and placed at /home/ga/Documents/origin_of_species_excerpt.docx. The source text is from the public domain (Project Gutenberg), and the body text paragraphs are adapted from Darwin's actual work. The task requires applying Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles to these chapter and section headers, then inserting a Table of Contents at the document's beginning.
